Autumn olive is a red berry with silver dots on it. its pitted so it has a seed in it and the taste reminds me of a sour blueberry. there is a whole row of these bushes right by the boat launch. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-November.
these berries greatly reassemble black berries but are a little bit smaller in size and are a tasty snack Falling Fruit season: July-September.
